summary: Qvantum Energi is a Swedish heat pump company specializing in connected, modular, and software-integrated heat pump systems. Recently signed multi-year partnership with Bad & Värme (Sweden's largest HVAC chain with 142 member companies, 1,200+ certified plumbers). Also launched UK operations. Focus on energy-efficient solutions for households and property owners. Key contact: Lina Simonsson (lina.simonsson@qvantum.com).
notes: Growing heat pump company expanding distribution network. Partnership with Bad & Värme shows they value channel partners. Could be interested in complementary products like circulating pumps for their heat pump systems.
